data.name: Basic Tree Removal
data.description: Standard removal of small to medium trees up to 12 inches DBH without safety rigging obstructions.
data.permitAwareness: Arborist permits required in municipal boundaries for trees exceeding 8 inches DBH.
data.inspectionAwareness: Post-removal ground inspection for disease vectors.
data.codeConsiderations: Conforms to ANSI A300 Pruning Standards.
dependencies: Utility line drops if power lines interfere
data.wasteDisposal: All brush chipped on site. Large logs hauled to municipal bio-mass dump sites.
data.proposalScopeOfWork: Provide professional tree service for Basic Tree Removal.
data.proposalAssumptions: Assumes standard truck access within 50 feet of tree base.
data.proposalExclusions: Excludes soil grading, stump removal (unless selected), and turf seeding.
data.warrantyLanguage: 30-day health assessment warranty on pruning. No warranty on complete removals.
data.productionNotes: Review local weather alerts. Avoid high wind executions.
